name: ICICI BANK LTD.
rationale: Best-in-class private bank, slightly cheap vs peers; soft revisions are noise on a multi-year franchise.

name: HINDALCO  INDUSTRIES  LTD
rationale: Aluminium/Novelis cash flows solid and cheap, but it is my biggest position with soft revisions — cut to size.

name: AXIS BANK LIMITED
rationale: Cheap private bank with improving franchise; valuation-supported even with middling revisions.

name: OIL AND NATURAL GAS CORP.
rationale: Large-cap, cheap on value, with strong rising revisions — ARM tilt backed by a second (value) leg.

name: BHARTI AIRTEL LIMITED
rationale: Telecom pricing power and ARPU uptrend intact; structural cash-flow compounder.

name: HDFC BANK LTD
rationale: Largest private bank, post-merger normalization; modestly cheap, durable compounder.

name: NTPC LTD
rationale: Power-capex and renewables build-out intact; cheap, but revisions softening so trim oversized weight.

name: GRASIM INDUSTRIES LTD
rationale: Quality holding-co (VSF/chemicals + cement + new paints/B2B) at a fair price with rising revisions.

name: COFORGE LIMITED
rationale: Mid-cap IT with rising revisions and strong deal momentum; ARM tilt confirmed by franchise.

name: RELIANCE INDUSTRIES LTD
rationale: Diversified conglomerate with retail/telecom optionality; fairly valued, low downgrade risk.

name: MAHINDRA & MAHINDRA LTD
rationale: SUV/tractor cycle leadership; fairly valued, franchise momentum offsets soft revisions.

name: TRENT LTD
rationale: Best-in-class retail compounder but rich; revisions have cooled, so size down not out.

name: MUTHOOT FINANCE LIMITED
rationale: Gold-loan franchise with strong rising revisions and a gold tailwind; quality NBFC, lower beta than the book.

name: STATE BANK OF INDIA
rationale: Cheapest large-cap PSU bank, strong value z; revisions cooling but valuation does the work.

name: SUN PHARMACEUTICAL IND L
rationale: Specialty-pharma compounder; defensive quality, keep despite neutral revisions.

name: THE PHOENIX MILLS LTD
rationale: Premier mall/retail-realty developer; consumption play intact but revisions soft, trim modestly.

name: INFOSYS LIMITED
rationale: Large-cap IT bellwether, slightly cheap; hold the quality even with soft sector revisions.

name: LIFE INSURA CORP OF INDIA
rationale: Large-cap, cheap insurer with rising revisions; cheap-with-a-catalyst, beta-lowering add.

name: SHRIRAM FINANCE LIMITED
rationale: Quality vehicle-finance franchise but revisions turning down; reduce, keep core stake.

name: BAJAJ FINANCE LIMITED
rationale: Premier consumer-lending franchise but pricey and revisions soft; trim, do not abandon.

name: SBI LIFE INSURANCE CO LTD
rationale: High-quality private life insurer; protection/par mix compounding, keep core stake.

name: TECH MAHINDRA LIMITED
rationale: Turnaround IT with margin-recovery story but revisions still soft; keep a small tactical position.

name: ETERNAL LIMITED
rationale: Food-delivery/quick-commerce leader; high-growth optionality, keep a measured stake.

name: AU SMALL FINANCE BANK LTD
rationale: Quality small-finance bank franchise but revisions weak and valuation full; reduce the tactical weight.
